worker.anim_emerge: emerge-8frames — re-assembled spritesheet (544x272 = 8 cols × 4 rows of 68×68); per-direction frames unchanged from prior commission, sheet layout corrected to match generateFrameNumbers start:8 end:15

ant-scout.role_marker: pointed leaf-green explorer cap integrated into head silhouette, sits low and slightly forward over eyes

ant-forager.role_marker: small carry-pouch slung on abdomen side, warm amber leather strap integrated into body

ant-digger.role_marker: chunky construction helmet integrated into head silhouette, warm amber/cream brim pulled forward

egg-and-larva-set.notes: egg_single now 48x40, larva_single now 64x40 (re-commissioned birth-sequence-rework); cluster cells preserved at original 48x32

egg-hatch.desc: f0: intact still egg; f1: egg tilts/bulges left (wiggle, no crack); f2: egg tilts/bulges right (wiggle, no crack); f3: hairline crack visible at top-centre (≥3px dark line); f4: crack widens clearly, shell splitting; f5: shell top portion lifts, dark shadow inside gap; f6: shell halves clearly separating, gap spans ≥1/3 egg width; f7: shell fully open, both halves splayed, dark hollow interior visible

egg-shell.desc: cracked egg-shell halves lying on chamber floor — lingers ~1 s after hatch anim completes

queen-crown.desc: warm-amber chunky-cute crown for queen ceremony

prompts.empty: pebble scatter on bare chamber floor, warm amber-beige, chunky-cute, low top-down, transparent bg
prompts.small: 2-3 bread crumbs + apple wedge + sugar cube, modest pile, ~30x18px footprint, warm amber palette
prompts.medium: 4-6 mixed food items heap, ~50x28px footprint, warm amber palette, chunky-cute
prompts.large: 8-10 mixed items full mound, ~62x36px footprint, warm amber palette, chunky-cute
